home.title: DilUp — Learn English online with a tutor who fits you
home.description: DilUp is Azerbaijan's online language platform. Find your perfect English tutor, set your budget, and start speaking from the very first lesson.

becomeTutor.title: Become a tutor on DilUp — set your own rate
becomeTutor.description: Teach English on DilUp. Set your own price, choose your hours, and earn on your terms with secure payments.

publicCta.title: Ready to start learning?
publicCta.subtitle: Find a tutor who fits your goal and budget, and book your first lesson today.

auth.checkEmail: Check your email for the confirmation link.

errors.password: Password must be at least 8 characters

register.title: Create your account
register.defaultTutorAbout: I am ready to teach live language lessons on DilUp.
register.terms: By continuing, you agree to the <terms>Terms of service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy policy</privacy>.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we will send you a secure reset link.
forgot.sentBody: We sent a reset link to {email}. Check your inbox.

panel.headline: Explore the world in your own voice
panel.subline: Start live lessons today with a tutor matched to your goals.
panel.quote: With DilUp, I reached IELTS 7.0 in three months. My tutor was with me at every step.
panel.author: Nilufar H.

hero.title: Learn English with <mark>a tutor who fits you</mark>
hero.subtitle: Thousands of live lessons at a price for every budget. Pick your tutor, pick your time, and start speaking from the very first lesson.
hero.trustNote: No risk — swap a trial lesson you didn't love for free
hero.imageAlt: DilUp tutor teaching online with a student on a video call

languageGrid.title: Which language do you want to learn?
languageGrid.subtitle: Start with English — more languages are on the way.

howItWorks.title: How <mark>DilUp</mark> works
howItWorks.step1Text: Filter by price, availability and specialty. Browse profiles and intro videos.
howItWorks.step2Text: Talk to your tutor in a live video lesson. No software to install.
howItWorks.step3Text: Keep your schedule, do the homework and see real results.

guarantee.title: A tutor match, guaranteed
guarantee.text: If your first lesson isn't the right fit, get a free trial with another tutor. No risk at all.

becomeTutor.title: Become a tutor, set your own rate
becomeTutor.text: Teach whenever and wherever you want. You're in control of your earnings — you set the price.

footer.tagline: The Azerbaijan-based marketplace where students learn live, one-to-one, with a tutor who fits their goal and budget.

onboarding.introText: Share your goal, level and weekly availability so we can shape the right tutor shortlist.
onboarding.subjectLabel: What do you want to learn?
onboarding.saveError: We saved your answers locally, but could not sync them yet.
onboarding.loadingText: We are turning your answers into useful search filters.

visual.pathText: Goals, schedule and tutor fit in one path

questions.timeline: When would you like to feel progress?
questions.industry: Which field should lessons connect to?
questions.industryHelp: This helps us surface tutors who understand your context.
questions.role: What is your role or day-to-day situation?
questions.topics: What topics should your tutor focus on?
questions.style: What teaching style works best for you?
questions.country: Where would you like your tutor to be based?
questions.alsoSpeaks: Any other language your tutor should speak?
questions.summary: Anything else that would help us match you?
questions.summaryHelp: We will use this to make the shortlist more useful.

placeholders.note: For example: I want to speak more confidently in meetings.

signup.title: Almost there. See {subject} tutors matched to you.
signup.text: Create a free account to keep your answers, unlock the shortlist and book a trial lesson.
signup.legal: By continuing, you agree to DilUp terms and privacy policy.

quickSetup.title: Let us show your first tutor matches.
quickSetup.text: This is not the long quiz — we only save your first preferences. You can skip it.
quickSetup.subject: What do you want to learn?
quickSetup.schedule: When do lessons usually work for you?
quickSetup.skipped: Setup skipped. You can update it later.
quickSetup.error: We could not save setup. Try again shortly.
